mapper.insert: insert into `score` (student_id, test_id, score, status, cheat) values (#{studentId}, #{testId}, #{score}, #{status}, #{cheat})
mapper.select: select score.*, student.name as studentName, student.username as studentNumber from `score` left join test on score.test_id = test.id left join student on score.student_id = student.id where test.test_paper_id = #{paperId}
select score.*, student.name as studentName, student.username as studentNumber from `score` left join student on score.student_id = student.id where score.test_id = #{testId} order by student.name

SELECT q.id, q.question_stem as questionStem, qt.name as questionTypeName, qt.variety as questionTypeVariety, tpq.score as typeScore, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM score WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND cheat != 1) as totalCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.status = '已批改' THEN a.score_id END) as gradedCount FROM test t INNER JOIN test_paper tp ON t.test_paper_id = tp.id INNER JOIN test_paper_question tpq ON tp.id = tpq.test_paper_id INNER JOIN question q ON tpq.question_id = q.id INNER JOIN question_type qt ON q.question_type_id = qt.id LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.test_paper_question_id = tpq.id AND a.score_id IN (SELECT id FROM score WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND cheat != 1) WHERE t.id = #{testId} AND qt.name NOT IN ('单选', '多选', '判断') AND q.id NOT IN (SELECT question_son_id FROM composite WHERE question_son_id IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY q.id, q.question_stem, qt.name, qt.variety, tpq.score, tpq.id ORDER BY tpq.id

SELECT q.id as id, q.question_stem as questionStem, qt.name as questionTypeName, qt.variety as questionTypeVariety, q.answer as answer FROM question q INNER JOIN question_type qt ON q.question_type_id = qt.id WHERE q.id = #{questionId}

SELECT s.id as scoreId, s.student_id as studentId, st.name as studentName, GROUP_CONCAT(a.id ORDER BY tpq.id) as answerIds, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(a.answer, '') ORDER BY tpq.id SEPARATOR '|||') as answers, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(a.score, 0) ORDER BY tpq.id) as scores, GROUP_CONCAT(COALESCE(a.status, '未批改') ORDER BY tpq.id SEPARATOR '|||') as statuses, GROUP_CONCAT(tpq.question_id ORDER BY tpq.id) as questionIds FROM score s INNER JOIN student st ON s.student_id = st.id INNER JOIN test t ON s.test_id = t.id INNER JOIN test_paper tp ON t.test_paper_id = tp.id INNER JOIN test_paper_question tpq ON tp.id = tpq.test_paper_id LEFT JOIN answer a ON a.score_id = s.id AND a.test_paper_question_id = tpq.id LEFT JOIN composite c ON c.question_son_id = tpq.question_id WHERE s.test_id = #{testId} AND (tpq.question_id = #{questionId} OR c.question_father_id = #{questionId}) AND s.cheat != 1 GROUP BY s.id, s.student_id, st.name ORDER BY st.name

SELECT score.id, score.student_id, score.test_id, score.score, score.status, score.cheat, student.name as studentName, student.username as studentNumber, test.name as testName, test.start as testStart, test_paper.name as testPaperName, teacher.name as teacherName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(c.name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM test_clazz tc LEFT JOIN clazz c ON tc.clazz_id = c.id WHERE tc.test_id = test.id) as clazzName FROM `score` LEFT JOIN student ON score.student_id = student.id LEFT JOIN test ON score.test_id = test.id LEFT JOIN test_paper ON test.test_paper_id = test_paper.id LEFT JOIN teacher ON test_paper.teacher_id = teacher.id WHERE score.cheat = 1
AND test.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{testName}, '%')
AND (student.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%') OR student.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{studentName}, '%'))
AND test_paper.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{testPaperName}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM test_clazz tc LEFT JOIN clazz c ON tc.clazz_id = c.id WHERE tc.test_id = test.id AND c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} )
ORDER BY test.start DESC, student.name

SELECT score.id, score.student_id, score.test_id, score.score, score.status, score.cheat, student.name as studentName, student.username as studentNumber, clazz.name as clazzName FROM `score` LEFT JOIN student ON score.student_id = student.id LEFT JOIN student_clazz sc ON student.id = sc.student_id LEFT JOIN clazz ON sc.clazz_id = clazz.id WHERE score.status = '已批改' AND score.test_id = #{testId} AND sc.clazz_id = #{clazzId} ORDER BY student.name
